sections.sectionTitle: Jakob in A Tapate' thu A Genkholhna

verses.text: Tua ciangin Jakob in a tapate sam a, “A hong tung ding hunte-ah note' tunga hong tung ding thu kong gen theihna dingin note hong kikhawm un
“Jakob' tapate aw, hong kikhawmin za un la, na pa Israel' thugen ngai un
“Reuben, nang pen ka ta upa, ka vangliatna leh ka tacil na hi a, a kiphasak pen, a vanglian pen na hi hi
Tuihual bangin na kip kei ding a, na tungtuang kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka zi na luppih a, ka lupna na mindai sak hi
“Simeon leh Levi, unau hi a, a hiam uh ngongtatna dingin a zang uh hi

Amau' kikhopna-ah ka kihel kei ding a, amau' pawl tawh ka kizom kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a heh manun mi that uh a, kiphatsakna lungsim tawh amaute in mawlpih dingin bawngtalte' zagui a sattat uh hi
Amau' sinsona lauhuai a, amau' hehna kihtakhuai hi. Ciamsiatna ngah ta uh hen! Jakob suante sungah amaute ka khenthang ding a, Israel sungah amaute ka thehthang ding hi
“Judah aw, na sanggamte in nang hong phat ding hi. Na galte' gawl na mek ding a, na sanggamte na mai-ah hong kun ding uh hi
Judah pen humpinelkai tawh kibang a, a sa matsa a nek khit ciangin a kua-ah a ciahkik tawh kibang hi. Humpinelkai bangin kizia-in a lumsuk hi. Kua in amah phawng ngam ding hiam
Judah in kumpi ciangkhut len tawntung ding a, a suan a khakte in zong ukna aana nei tawntung ding hi. Minam dangte in ama tungah siah puak ding a, zahtakna tawh ama mai-ah kun ding uh hi
A sakolno leenggui-ah khih a, a lano leenggui limci penah khih hi. Amah in a puante leenggahzu sungah sawp a, a puansilhte leenggahtui san sungah a sawp hi
Leenggahzu a neknekna-in a mit san gega a, bawngnawi a neknekna-in a ha pak hi
“Zebulun, tuipi gei-ah teng ding hi. Amah, teembaw khawlna mun suak ding a, Sidon ciangdongah a gamgi om ding hi
“Issakhar, a hat la tawh kibang a, vangik nih kikalah a lum hi
A tawlngakna mun hoihsa a, a leitang noptuak sa hi. Tua ahih ciangin van pua dingin a liangko niamsak a, sila bangin na kisemsak hi
“Dan in Israel minam dangte mah bangin a mite thu khen ding hi
Dan pen lampi-ah gulpi hi ding a, sul gei-ah gulgu nei hi ding hi. Sakol' khetul petin a tuangpa a nungkiat hi
“Nong hotkhiat ding ka ngak hi, Topa
“Gad pen a buluhte in buluh ding a, ahih hangin amah in amaute sulzuih kik ding hi
“Asher' lo-ah an tampi piang ding a, amah in kumpi anlimte bawl ding hi
“Naftali, a kikhah sakhipi hi a, sakhino suakkhia sak hi
“Josef, a gah pha hiang ahi hi. Ciktui gei-a om a gah pha hiang hi a, a hiangte kulh tungah zam hi
Thal tawite in nakpi takin amah simin, amah thal tawh kap uh a, nasia takin gimsak uh hi
Ahih hangin ama thal liing loin om a, a khutte kizaptel sak hi. Jakob' Vanglian Pa' khut (Israel Suangpi, Tuucingpa' min
nang hong huh ding na pa' Pasian in tunga om vantung thuphate, nuai-a tuithukna sunga om thuphate, khawilevulh leh tuletate, nangma tungah hong pia hi

Na pa' thuphate pen tawntung mual liante' thupha, tawntung mual neute sangin vanglian zaw hi. Tua thuphate Josef' lu tungah hong tung hen la, a sanggamte' kiang panin a kituam koihpa' tungah hong tung ta hen
“Benjamin, a ne bakbak keivom hi a, zingsangin a sa matsa ne-in, nitakin a ngahsa teng hawm hi,” a ci hi
Hihte khempeuh pen Israel minam sawmlenihte ahi hi. Hih thute pen amau tawh a kituak ciatin a pa in amaute thupha pia-in a gente ahi hi.

Tua ciangin Jakob in a tate thuhilhin amaute kiangah, “Kei, ka mipihte kiangah a kigawm ding ka hita hi. Kivuina ding munin neih dingin Abraham in Hit mi Efron' tung panin a lo tawh a leikhop, Kanaan gam, Mamre nisuahna lamah a om Makpelah lo-a leihawm, Hit mi Efron' lo-a leihawm han sungah ka pate tawh hong vuikhawm un
Tua lai munah amaute in Abraham leh a zi Sarah vui uh hi. Tua lai munah amaute in Isaac leh a zi Rebekah vui uh hi. Tua lai munah keimah in Leah ka vui hi
Lo leh tua sunga om leihawm Hit mite' tung panin a kilei ahi hi,” a ci hi
Jakob in a tapate thuhilh a man khit ciangin, a lupna tungah lai-tat a, a nunung pen a hu sang-in ama mipihte kiang a zuan ta hi.
